reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, excelente shoping y muy lindo lugar con mesas a la sombra de los árboles, para comer

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, excellent shopping and a very nice place with tables in the shade of the trees to eat.

reviews.comment:
Atención excelente en playa y shop . Siempre llego fuera de hora de cena y de igual modo se preocupan mucho.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service on the beach and in the shop. I always arrive outside of dinner hours and they still take great care of me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNncF95b0NnEAE

reviews.comment:

Excellent service, food, cleanliness, comfortable restrooms, well-maintained park, good prices, a great place to stop for a meal and a rest
